name: Bubble Shooter Aura
description: Bubble Shooter Aura is a modern and calming take on the classic bubble shooter game. Featuring soft colors, smooth animations, and subtle glowing aura effects, the game creates a relaxing yet addictive experience. With intuitive controls and satisfying gameplay, it’s easy to pick up and enjoyable for both casual players and longtime bubble shooter fans.
